---
title: "富集分析报告"
author: "{{< meta author >}}"
date: "{{< meta date >}}"
format:
  docx:
    echo: false
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
  html:
    echo: false
    toc: true
    self-contained: true
  pdf:
    echo: false
    documentclass: ctexart
    toc: true
params:
  project_name: "Enrichment Analysis"
  author: "IKL"
  date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
  results_dir: "."
  species: "hsapiens"
  analysis_type: "combined"
  go_enabled: true
  kegg_enabled: true
  gsea_enabled: true
  n_go_terms: 0
  n_kegg_terms: 0
  n_gsea_terms: 0
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, error = FALSE)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

# 从参数获取值
project_name <- params$project_name
results_dir <- params$results_dir
species <- params$species
analysis_type <- params$analysis_type
go_enabled <- params$go_enabled
kegg_enabled <- params$kegg_enabled
gsea_enabled <- params$gsea_enabled

# 物种名称映射
species_name <- switch(species,
  "hsapiens" = "人类 (Homo sapiens)",
  "mmusculus" = "小鼠 (Mus musculus)",
  "rnorvegicus" = "大鼠 (Rattus norvegicus)",
  species
)

# 检查结果文件
go_dir <- file.path(results_dir, "go")
kegg_dir <- file.path(results_dir, "kegg")
gsea_dir <- file.path(results_dir, "gsea")
plots_dir <- file.path(results_dir, "plots")

# GO 结果
go_files <- list(
  bp = file.path(go_dir, "GO_BP_results.csv"),
  cc = file.path(go_dir, "GO_CC_results.csv"),
  mf = file.path(go_dir, "GO_MF_results.csv"),
  dotplot = file.path(plots_dir, "GO_dotplot.pdf"),
  barplot = file.path(plots_dir, "GO_barplot.pdf")
)

# KEGG 结果
kegg_files <- list(
  results = file.path(kegg_dir, "KEGG_results.csv"),
  dotplot = file.path(plots_dir, "KEGG_dotplot.pdf"),
  barplot = file.path(plots_dir, "KEGG_barplot.pdf"),
  pathway = file.path(plots_dir, "KEGG_pathway.pdf")
)

# GSEA 结果
gsea_files <- list(
  results = file.path(gsea_dir, "GSEA_results.csv"),
  ridgeplot = file.path(plots_dir, "GSEA_ridgeplot.pdf"),
  dotplot = file.path(plots_dir, "GSEA_dotplot.pdf"),
  gseaplot = file.path(plots_dir, "GSEA_enrichment_score.pdf")
)

# 读取数据
if (file.exists(go_files$bp)) {
  go_bp <- read.csv(go_files$bp, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}
if (file.exists(kegg_files$results)) {
  kegg_results <- read.csv(kegg_files$results, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}
if (file.exists(gsea_files$results)) {
  gsea_results <- read.csv(gsea_files$results, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}
```

# 分析概述

**项目名称**: `r project_name`

**分析日期**: `r params$date`

**物种**: `r species_name`

**分析类型**: `r analysis_type`

## 分析内容

| 分析类型 | 状态 |
|----------|------|
| GO 富集分析 | `r ifelse(go_enabled, "已启用", "未启用")` |
| KEGG 通路分析 | `r ifelse(kegg_enabled, "已启用", "未启用")` |
| GSEA 分析 | `r ifelse(gsea_enabled, "已启用", "未启用")` |

```{r summary-stats}
stats <- data.frame(
  分析类型 = c(),
  显著条目数 = c()
)

if (go_enabled && exists("go_bp")) {
  stats <- rbind(stats, data.frame(
    分析类型 = "GO Biological Process",
    显著条目数 = nrow(go_bp)
  ))
}

if (kegg_enabled && exists("kegg_results")) {
  stats <- rbind(stats, data.frame(
    分析类型 = "KEGG Pathway",
    显著条目数 = nrow(kegg_results)
  ))
}

if (gsea_enabled && exists("gsea_results")) {
  stats <- rbind(stats, data.frame(
    分析类型 = "GSEA",
    显著条目数 = nrow(gsea_results)
  ))
}

if (nrow(stats) > 0) {
  kable(stats, caption = "分析结果统计", format = "simple")
}
```

# GO 富集分析

```{r go-check, include=FALSE}
go_has_results <- go_enabled && (exists("go_bp") && nrow(go_bp) > 0)
```

```{r go-section, eval=go_has_results, results='asis'}
cat("GO (Gene Ontology) 富集分析从生物过程 (BP)、细胞组分 (CC) 和分子功能 (MF) 三个层面解析基因功能。\n\n")
```

## GO 结果可视化

```{r go-dotplot, fig.width=10, fig.height=8, fig.cap="GO 富集分析点图", eval=go_has_results}
if (file.exists(go_files$dotplot)) {
  knitr::include_graphics(go_files$dotplot)
}
```

## GO 富集条目 (Top 10)

```{r go-table, eval=go_has_results}
if (exists("go_bp") && nrow(go_bp) > 0) {
  display_cols <- intersect(c("Description", "GeneRatio", "p.adjust", "Count"), colnames(go_bp))
  kable(head(go_bp[, display_cols, drop=FALSE], 10),
        caption = "GO Biological Process Top 10",
        format = "simple",
        digits = 3,
        row.names = FALSE)
}
```

# KEGG 通路分析

```{r kegg-check, include=FALSE}
kegg_has_results <- kegg_enabled && (exists("kegg_results") && nrow(kegg_results) > 0)
```

```{r kegg-section, eval=kegg_has_results, results='asis'}
cat("KEGG (Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes) 通路分析识别基因参与的代谢和信号通路。\n\n")
```

## KEGG 结果可视化

```{r kegg-dotplot, fig.width=10, fig.height=8, fig.cap="KEGG 通路富集分析点图", eval=kegg_has_results}
if (file.exists(kegg_files$dotplot)) {
  knitr::include_graphics(kegg_files$dotplot)
}
```

## KEGG 通路条目 (Top 10)

```{r kegg-table, eval=kegg_has_results}
if (exists("kegg_results") && nrow(kegg_results) > 0) {
  display_cols <- intersect(c("Description", "GeneRatio", "p.adjust", "Count"), colnames(kegg_results))
  kable(head(kegg_results[, display_cols, drop=FALSE], 10),
        caption = "KEGG Pathway Top 10",
        format = "simple",
        digits = 3,
        row.names = FALSE)
}
```

# GSEA 分析

```{r gsea-check, include=FALSE}
gsea_has_results <- gsea_enabled && (exists("gsea_results") && nrow(gsea_results) > 0)
```

```{r gsea-section, eval=gsea_has_results, results='asis'}
cat("GSEA (Gene Set Enrichment Analysis) 基于基因排序进行富集分析，可识别更微弱的生物学信号。\n\n")
```

## GSEA 结果可视化

```{r gsea-ridgeplot, fig.width=10, fig.height=8, fig.cap="GSEA 山脊图", eval=gsea_has_results}
if (file.exists(gsea_files$ridgeplot)) {
  knitr::include_graphics(gsea_files$ridgeplot)
}
```

## GSEA 富集条目 (Top 10)

```{r gsea-table, eval=gsea_has_results}
if (exists("gsea_results") && nrow(gsea_results) > 0) {
  display_cols <- intersect(c("Description", "NES", "pvalue", "p.adjust"), colnames(gsea_results))
  kable(head(gsea_results[, display_cols, drop=FALSE], 10),
        caption = "GSEA Top 10 Pathways",
        format = "simple",
        digits = 3,
        row.names = FALSE)
}
```

# 结论

```{r conclusion}
cat("本次富集分析完成以下内容：\n\n")

if (go_enabled && exists("go_bp") && nrow(go_bp) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("- GO 分析识别出 %d 个显著富集的生物过程\n", nrow(go_bp)))
}
if (kegg_enabled && exists("kegg_results") && nrow(kegg_results) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("- KEGG 分析识别出 %d 个显著富集的通路\n", nrow(kegg_results)))
}
if (gsea_enabled && exists("gsea_results") && nrow(gsea_results) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("- GSEA 分析识别出 %d 个显著富集的基因集\n", nrow(gsea_results)))
}
```

---

*报告由 Quarto 自动生成*
